ol.li: VTable: Precedes the table in serial sequence. Multiple tables can share the same VTable.
Offsets: Most offsets are relative to the location of the pointer itself.
Alignment: Fields padded to natural power-of-two (doubles on 8-byte boundaries).
Absence: Missing fields in VTable (offset 0) use schema defaults.

div.p: Physical Layout: VTable ─────────────────────── +0 uint16 v_size: 12 +2 uint16 t_size: 24 +4 uint16 f_sym: 16 +6 uint16 f_prc: 8 +8 uint16 f_qty: 4 +10 uint16 f_ts: 0
Physical Layout: Object Data ────────────────────────── +0 int32 voffset: -12 +4 int32 quantity: 100 +8 double price: 150.25 +16 uint32 sym_ptr: 28
Physical Layout: AAPL ───────────────────────── +0 uint32 length: 4 +4 char[5] data: "AAPL\0"
